name: Bilt Palladium Card
effective_cost: Moderate: $200 Bilt Cash + $400 in hotel credits ($600 total) can more than cover the fee if you use both, plus Priority Pass lounge access

verdict.text: Keep if you'll use Priority Pass and capture the $400 hotel credit

earn_rates.category: Hotels, booked on the Bilt Travel Portal
Flights, booked on the Bilt Travel Portal
Lyft, after linking Bilt and Lyft accounts

earn_note: *Housing Rewards isn't a flat rate. It uses the same up-to-1.25x mechanic as every Bilt Card. Terms and conditions apply. Palladium is the only Bilt Card with a 2x uncapped base rate on everything else; Blue and Obsidian earn 1x on non-bonused spend. New cardholders get $300 in Bilt Cash on account opening (no spend required), plus a separate 50,000-point + Gold Elite Status bonus after $4,000 in everyday spend (excluding rent/mortgage) within 90 days.

redemption_options.method: Transfer to airline/hotel partners (19 airlines, 7 hotels, mostly 1:1)
Book travel directly through the Bilt Travel Portal
Statement credit, rent/mortgage credit, or Lyft rides

points.note: Same transfer-partner ceiling as every Bilt Card: 2.2¢/point per The Points Guy on well-chosen transfers, 1¢/point on cash-equivalent redemptions.

transfer_partners.highlight: 19 airline and 7 hotel partners, almost all at 1:1 (Accor Live Limitless is 3:2): Hyatt, Marriott, Hilton, IHG, Wyndham, and I Prefer on the hotel side; United, Air France/KLM, Emirates, Cathay Pacific, and Southwest among the airlines.
transfer_partners.recent_changes: Wyndham Rewards and I Prefer Hotel Rewards (Preferred Hotels & Resorts, 700+ independent properties) were both added as transfer partners in 2026.

credits.name: Annual Bilt Cash
credits.subtitle: $200 · issued every year, up to $100 rolls over
credits.description: $200 in Bilt Cash issued annually, on top of the one-time $300 welcome bonus. Bilt Cash can be spent at partner merchants (Lyft, Bilt Travel hotels, SoulCycle, Grubhub, Walgreens, GoPuff) or unlocked toward rent/mortgage points. Up to $100 of unused balance carries into the next calendar year; anything above that expires December 31.
tips: Spend down to the $100 rollover threshold before year-end so nothing above it expires unused.
Bilt Cash also unlocks a point accelerator adding 1x to your choice category, up to $5,000 in spend.

credits.name: Bilt Travel Hotel Credit
credits.subtitle: $200 twice a year · Bilt Travel Portal hotel bookings only
credits.description: Up to $200 applied to a qualifying hotel booking (2+ nights, made through the Bilt Travel Portal) from January–June, and another $200 from July–December, for $400/year total. You must toggle the credit on at checkout; for pay-at-hotel bookings it posts as a statement credit after your stay.
tips: Only applies to bookings made through the Bilt Travel Portal, not hotels booked directly, and only to stays of 2 nights or longer.
Each $200 window is use-it-or-lose-it: unused credit in the January–June period doesn't roll into July–December.

insurance.detail: Not responsible for fraudulent transactions once reported, per standard Mastercard protection
MasterRental coverage applies first, before your personal auto insurance. Exact per-rental and annual limits are in the Guide to Benefits, not public marketing.
Confirmed benefit; exact per-trip and annual dollar limits are in the Guide to Benefits, not public marketing.
Trip Delay Reimbursement is a confirmed benefit; exact per-day and annual limits are in the Guide to Benefits, not public marketing.
Baggage Delay Insurance added exclusively at the Palladium tier; exact per-day and annual limits are in the Guide to Benefits, not public marketing.
Lost or Damaged Luggage Insurance added exclusively at the Palladium tier; exact per-item and annual limits are in the Guide to Benefits, not public marketing.
Purchase Assurance is a confirmed benefit; exact per-item and annual dollar limits are in the Guide to Benefits, not public marketing.
Confirmed benefit; exact extension length is in the Guide to Benefits, not public marketing.
Cellular Wireless Telephone Protection is a confirmed benefit for phones on a bill paid with this card; exact deductible and annual limits are in the Guide to Benefits, not public marketing.
Price Drop Protection added exclusively at the Palladium tier; exact eligibility window and reimbursement limits are in the Guide to Benefits, not public marketing.

protection_note: The fullest travel-protection set of any Bilt Card, adding baggage delay, lost/damaged luggage, and price drop protection on top of Obsidian's benefits, though exact dollar limits sit in the non-public Guide to Benefits.
rental_note: MasterRental coverage applies first, ahead of your personal auto policy, so decline the counter's CDW and pay with this card. Exact dollar limits are in the Guide to Benefits.

status_perks.name: Priority Pass
status_perks.note: Marketed as 'worth $469/year.' Bilt doesn't publicly specify a guest allowance or membership count, unlike some competitors' explicit multi-membership Priority Pass perks, so confirm exact terms before counting on it for a group.

status_perks.name: Bilt Gold Elite Status
status_perks.note: Awarded with the welcome bonus after meeting the $4,000/90-day spending requirement; valid through January 15th of the second calendar year following qualification.

services.name: No transaction fee on rent, mortgage, and HOA payments
services.detail: Pay housing costs through Bilt with no card-processing fee. Funds are debited from a linked bank account within 24 hours, not your credit line.

services.name: No foreign transaction fees
services.detail: $0 on purchases made outside the US.

services.name: 10% intro APR
services.detail: 10% on new eligible purchases for the first 12 billing cycles, then a variable 26.74%–34.74% APR applies.

services.name: Stainless steel card
services.detail: Premium metal card body; a limited-edition mirror-finish design has also been offered.

additional_cards.title: Additional cards

benefits.text: Earns Bilt Points on their spend (into your account)
Manage directly in the Bilt app
No separate Priority Pass, Bilt Cash, or hotel credit of their own

additional_cards.note: $95/year per Authorized User on the Palladium Card, the highest of the three tiers ($0 on Blue, $50 on Obsidian).

timeline.text: Bilt Card 2.0 launches as a three-tier lineup (Blue/Obsidian/Palladium), replacing the original single Bilt Mastercard and removing its 5-transaction-per-month requirement to earn on rent.
